name: Fruits
description: Fresh and dried fruits including berries, citrus, tropical, and stone fruits

name: Vegetables
description: Non-leafy vegetables including root vegetables, squash, peppers, mushrooms, and alliums

name: Leafy Greens
description: Edible leaves and salad greens including spinach, kale, lettuce, and chard

name: Legumes
description: Beans, lentils, peas, tofu, and soy-based products high in plant protein and fibre

name: Nuts
description: Tree nuts including almonds, walnuts, cashews, pistachios, and similar

name: Seeds
description: Edible seeds including chia, flax, hemp, sunflower, and pumpkin seeds

name: Grains & Cereals
description: Whole and refined grains including rice, oats, wheat, barley, quinoa, and grain products

name: Red Meat
description: Beef, lamb, pork, and other red meats in raw state

name: Poultry
description: Chicken, turkey, duck, and other poultry in raw state

name: Fish & Seafood
description: Fish, shellfish, and other seafood in raw state

name: Eggs
description: Whole eggs and egg components from various poultry

name: Dairy
description: Milk, cheese, yogurt, butter, and cream from animal sources

name: Dairy Alternatives
description: Plant-based milk and yogurt alternatives (oat, almond, soy, coconut)

name: Oils & Fats
description: Cooking oils, animal fats, and spreads

name: Herbs & Spices
description: Dried and fresh culinary herbs and spices
